overall.description: A first-person exploration through a rural field of red poppies in a high-quality game engine environment. The camera moves steadily through a wooden fence gate toward a dilapidated house, then continues past it through overgrown terrain with scattered trees and abandoned vehicles under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rural field dense with red poppies under an overcast sky. The camera approaches a weathered wooden fence gate with an abandoned house visible in the distance. Red petals occasionally float through the air, and vignette effects briefly darken the screen edges.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the fence line, the camera proceeds through denser vegetation with tall bushes in the foreground. The abandoned house grows larger as the camera approaches, transitioning from distant backdrop to mid-ground feature while navigating through mixed poppies and tall grass.

segments.scene_description: Passing the abandoned house, the camera moves into a more open area dominated by tall dry grass. An abandoned vehicle wreck appears on the right, and the landscape reveals additional distant structures. The red poppies become sparse as the terrain transitions to overgrown prairie with scattered trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense field of red poppies that gradually opens into a desolate, overgrown prairie. It begins by gliding through a sea of red blooms under an overcast sky, approaching a weathered wooden fence gate with an abandoned house looming in the distance. As the camera passes through the fence line, the vegetation thickens into tall bushes and mixed grasses, bringing the dilapidated house into sharp focus as a mid-ground feature. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the house into a more open expanse where the red poppies thin out, revealing an abandoned vehicle wreck on the right. Finally, the terrain transitions into a wide, dry prairie with scattered trees and distant structures under the gray sky.
